topics.title: Riley Martin's Performance and Time Travel
topics.summary: The studio discusses Riley Martin's erratic behavior during a previous broadcast, his claims of time travel to 1939, and the technical difficulties involving a caller who spoke Chinese.

topics.title: Don Imus Settlement and Legal Fallout
topics.summary: The studio discusses Don Imus's settlement with CBS, his potential return to radio, and the defamation lawsuit filed by a Rutgers basketball player.

topics.title: Broadcasting Lobbying and Van Halen Tour
topics.summary: The studio discusses the National Association of Broadcasters' lobbying expenditures, the career of baseballer Phil Rizzuto, and potential opening slots for The Losers on the Van Halen tour.

topics.title: Golf Equipment Invention Debate
topics.summary: The studio features a debate over the merits of different golf camera mounting systems and the development timeline of a specific clamp product.

topics.title: Golf Equipment Patent Dispute
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal risks and manufacturing process of a golf cart camera mount while debating its practicality compared to existing tripod alternatives.

topics.title: Buzz Aldrin's Lunar Experience and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Buzz Aldrin discussing his experiences as a moonwalker, his military background, personal struggles with sobriety and marriage, and the technical aspects of lunar exploration.

topics.title: Buzz Aldrin Interview and Space Exploration
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Buzz Aldrin regarding his moon landing, military service, and perspectives on space exploration.

topics.title: Maxim Magazine Article Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses a Maxim magazine article labeling Howard Stern as "hideous" and the subsequent reactions from listeners and colleagues.

topics.title: Comedy and Suicide Awareness
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with comedian Jim Florentine regarding his transition from crude comedy to advocacy for suicide prevention following the loss of a close friend.

topics.title: Jim Florentine Discusses Personal Tragedy and Comedy
topics.summary: The studio features Jim Florentine discussing the impact of his former girlfriend's suicide on his personal life, his mental health journey involving a spiritual healer, and his continued career in stand-up comedy.

topics.title: Jim Florentine Discusses Suicide Prevention and Personal Loss
topics.summary: The studio features Jim Florentine discussing his experiences with loss, the complexities of suicide awareness, and an upcoming fundraiser for a suicide prevention foundation.

topics.title: Superfan Roundtable Conflict and Dating Proposals
topics.summary: The studio discusses a dispute between Mutt and Joey Boots over the Superfan Roundtable show, followed by a comedic segment where Jim Florentine attempts to arrange a date with Robin.

topics.title: Robin Quivers and Jim Florentine Date
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the potential romantic relationship between Robin Quivers and Jim Florentine, including their plans for a dinner date.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Upcoming Comedy Shows
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the passing of Phil Rizzuto, an upcoming Elvis vigil at Graceland, local news stories involving a baseball brawl and a record-breaking centenarian, and various upcoming comedy tour dates.
